top_signals.title: Christine Lagarde: Hearing of the Committee on Economic and Monetary Affairs of the European Parliament
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Cboe Revives Binary Options to Compete with Kalshi, Polymarket
top_signals.summary: Cboe Global Markets, Inc. announced Tuesday that it has brought back a type of S&P 500 contract after a hiatus of more than a decade, which in the meantime has become a popular mainstay of prediction market platforms Kalshi and Polymarket.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Alibaba sues Pentagon over inclusion on Chinese military blacklist
top_signals.summary: Ecommerce giant claims US defence department’s ‘arbitrary and capricious’ decision lacked evidence
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Waller, Welcoming Remarks on the International Role of the U.S. Dollar
top_signals.summary: Speech At the Fifth Conference on the International Roles of the Dollar, Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, Washington, D.C.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin may need to plunge 15% or more to mark bottom, according to this long-time indicator
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Barr, Deregulating in a Financial Boom: What Could Go Wrong?
top_signals.summary: Speech At American University, Washington, D.C.

top_signals.title: Waller, Policy Risks Have Changed
top_signals.summary: Speech At The Centre for Central Banking Guest Lecture, Frankfurt School of Finance and Management, Frankfurt, Germany

top_signals.title: Two Scattered Spider members plead guilty over cyberattack that crippled London transit
top_signals.summary: A 20-year-old and an 18-year-old admitted to infiltrating the network of Transport for London in 2024, disrupting public transportation services for months.
